title: RVT.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT_RECALCULE — Current behavioural score recomputed
description: Runtime contract for the resource event published by CAP.BSP.001.SCO whenever the behavioural score of a beneficiary is recomputed after a transaction or a significant behavioural signal. Every payload published on the operational RabbitMQ topic exchange owned by CAP.BSP.001.SCO with routing key EVT.BSP.001.SCORE_RECALCULE.RVT.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT_RECALCULE MUST validate against this schema (ADR-TECH-STRAT-001 Rules 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6). The payload is a domain event DDD: it carries the data of the score-recalculation aggregate transition — coherent and atomic — not a snapshot of the read model RES.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT, and not a technical patch of fields. Beneficiary identity resolution toward OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIAIRE.identifiant_interne is performed by consumers via CAP.REF.001.BEN lookup using the identifiant_dossier correlation key carried by this payload (the producer never carries the canonical identifier).

identifiant_evaluation.description: Unique identifier of this evaluation (UUID or business code). Mirrors RES.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT.identifiant_evaluation and OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.identifiant_evaluation.

identifiant_dossier.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the relevant participation case (Reliever case ID). Mirrors RES.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT.identifiant_dossier and OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.identifiant_dossier. Identity resolution: consumers resolve identifiant_dossier toward OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIAIRE.identifiant_interne via a CAP.REF.001.BEN (Beneficiary Reference) lookup. The producer (CAP.BSP.001.SCO) NEVER carries the canonical identifiant_interne.

valeur_score.description: Numeric value of the behavioural score AFTER recomputation (transition target value). Mirrors RES.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT.valeur_score and OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.valeur_score.

delta_score.description: Score variation compared to the previous evaluation (transition delta). Domain event DDD field — captures the magnitude of the transition. Mirrors RES.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT.delta_score.

poids.description: Weight applied to this factor in the score recomputation (signed; positive = upward contribution, negative = downward).

valeur.description: Optional measured value of the factor at recomputation time.

facteurs_contributifs.description: Factors that contributed to this recomputation, with their type and weight. Mirrors RES.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT.facteurs_contributifs and OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.facteurs_contributifs.

type_evaluation.description: Evaluation type — INITIAL (enrolment baseline) or COURANT (post-transaction recomputation). Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.type_evaluation.

evenement_declencheur.description: Identifier of the transaction or behavioural signal that triggered the recomputation. Mirrors RES.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT.evenement_declencheur. Carries the causal link of the domain event DDD.

timestamp_calcul.description: Recomputation timestamp (ISO-8601, UTC recommended). Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.timestamp_calcul and RES.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT.timestamp_calcul.

version_modele.description: Version of the scoring model used for this recomputation (e.g. SemVer or model-registry tag). Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.version_modele and RES.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT.version_modele.
